THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CHARLES THOMAS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RILEY NESBET IS PRESENT. HONG NIN TAI IS NOT PRESENT. THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT STATED HIS REQUEST TO DISMISS HIS COUNTER CLAIM AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
